title: senecio juniperinus var. epitrachys
intro: Senecio juniperinus var. epitrachys, also known as Trailing Groundsela or Ragwort, is a variety of the Senecio juniperinus plant, a perennial herb native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senecio juniperinus var. epitrachys include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote skin healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves to harness its medicinal properties.
